Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Components

UI building blocks for a Storybook-style component workshop. Each component maps to a specific region of the three-column app shell.

Layout Architecture

.cf-header — top navigation bar with logo, nav links, search
.cf-sidebar
story tree
.cf-toolbar — tool buttons
.cf-canvas — isolated story preview
.cf-addon-panel — controls / actions / source
.cf-docs-panel
props & docs
.cf-statusbar — status messages and version

All Components

App Shell

Root layout grid — header, workbench, and status bar. The skeleton every other component sits inside.

.cf-app .cf-header .cf-workbench

Sidebar & Tree

Scrollable story hierarchy with collapsible groups, active leaf, and badges.

.cf-sidebar .cf-tree .cf-tree-item

Toolbar

Tool buttons with active states, grouped by separator, and a spacer to push items right.

.cf-toolbar .cf-tool .cf-toolbar-group

Canvas & Preview

Isolated rendering surface with dot-grid background, preview frame card, and loading overlay.

.cf-canvas .cf-preview-frame .cf-preview-card

Addon Panel

Bottom tab panel for Controls, Actions, Source, and Accessibility addons. Collapsible.

.cf-addon-panel .cf-tabbar .cf-addon-tab

Controls

Args editor grid for tweaking story props. Wraps any form control with labeled rows.

.cf-control-grid .cf-control .cf-control-label

Docs Panel

Right-side panel with props table, usage examples, and sticky header for component documentation.

.cf-docs-panel .cf-props-table .cf-doc-example

Status Bar

Thin footer bar showing workshop state, error count, and version. Mirrors VS Code / Storybook style.

.cf-statusbar

Story Card

Linked card for story overview grids and docs indexes. Includes icon, title, meta tags, and quality variant.

.cf-story-card .cf-story-icon .cf-quality-card
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
